header.location: Portland, OR (Open to Remote or Relocation)

summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People Project Manager who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with cross-functional stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always seek ways we can improve people experience through structured, human-centered project management.
